scripts.build:electron: bun build electron/main.ts --target=node --format=cjs --outfile electron/dist/main.cjs && bun build electron/preload.ts --target=node --format=cjs --outfile electron/dist/preload.cjs
scripts.build: bun run check:agent && bun run build:agent && tsc && vite build
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k -n vite,elec "bun run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:1420 && bun run build:electron && ELECTRON_DEV_URL=http://localhost:1420 electron ."
scripts.test:supervisor: docker run --rm --privileged -v "$PWD/src-tauri/resources/supervisor:/app:ro" -w /app capybara-supervisor-test sh -lc 'CAPYBARA_SUPERVISOR_INTEGRATION=1 pytest -q -p no:cacheprovider'
